name: Savory Pepper Steak
recipeIngredient: 2 pounds Beef round steak (1/2 inch thick)
2 large Green Peppers, seeded and cut into 1/2 inch strips
1 tablespoon Beef Flavor Base (paste or granules)
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the steak into strips.
2. In a bowl, mix together the flour, salt, and black pepper. Toss with the steak strips to coat thoroughly.
3. Add the seasoned steak strips to the crockpot with the chopped onion and minced garlic. Stir gently.
4. In a separate bowl, combine diced tomatoes with the beef flavor base, soy sauce, and Worcestershire sauce.
5. Pour the tomato mixture into the crockpot, ensuring the meat is well moistened.
6. Stir in half of the green pepper strips. Cover and cook on low setting for 8 to 12 hours.
7. One hour before serving, turn the crockpot to high setting and stir in the remaining green pepper strips.
8. If a gravy is desired, make a smooth paste by mixing 3 tablespoons flour with 3 tablespoons water. Stir this into the crockpot until thickened. Cover and cook for a few more minutes.
9. Serve the pepper steak hot over fluffy rice.
